description: hospital in North Carolina, United States
description_wiki:
Duke University Hospital is a 1062
-bed acute care facility and an academic tertiary care facility located in Durham, North Carolina, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: New Jersey is a state located in both the Mid-Atlantic and Northeastern regions of the United States.

The global COVID-19 pandemic (also known as the coronavirus pandemic), caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), began with an outbreak in Wuhan, China, in December 2019.

entity: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
surface_forms: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
aliases: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996
description: United States federal law concerning health information
description_wiki: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 (HIPAA, or the Kennedy–Kassebaum Act) is a United States Act of Congress enacted by the 104th United States Congress and signed into law by President Bill Clinton on August 21, 1996.

description: full-face respirator that provides filtered air to the wearer using an electric fan
description_wiki: A powered air-purifying respirator (PAPR) is a type of respirator used to safeguard workers against contaminated air.
HEPA (, high efficiency particulate air, or high efficiency particulate arresting) is an efficiency standard of air filters.
